```python
import pytest

from your_module import validate_password  # Replace 'your_module' with the actual module name


def test_valid_password_happy_path():
    """Test a valid password that meets all criteria."""
    assert validate_password("Password1") is True


def test_valid_password_with_special_characters():
    """Test a valid password including special characters (not required, but allowed)."""
    assert validate_password("Passw0rd!") is True


def test_valid_password_exact_length():
    """Test a valid password exactly 8 characters long."""
    assert validate_password("Abcdefg1") is True


def test_valid_password_longer_than_minimum():
    """Test a valid password longer than 8 characters."""
    assert validate_password("AVeryLongPassword123") is True


def test_invalid_password_too_short():
    """Test a password shorter than 8 characters."""
    assert validate_password("Pass1") is False


def test_invalid_password_empty_string():
    """Test an empty string password."""
    assert validate_password("") is False


def test_invalid_password_no_uppercase():
    """Test a password missing uppercase letters."""
    assert validate_password("password1") is False


def test_invalid_password_no_lowercase():
    """Test a password missing lowercase letters."""
    assert validate_password("PASSWORD1") is False


def test_invalid_password_no_digit():
    """Test a password missing digits."""
    assert validate_password("Password") is False


def test_invalid_password_only_digits():
    """Test a password with only digits (meets length but missing letters)."""
    assert validate_password("12345678") is False


def test_invalid_password_only_uppercase_no_digit():
    """Test a password with only uppercase letters (no digit, no lowercase)."""
    assert validate_password("ABCDEFGH") is False


def test_invalid_password_only_lowercase_no_digit():
    """Test a password with only lowercase letters (no digit, no uppercase)."""
    assert validate_password("abcdefgh") is False


def test_invalid_password_mixed_case_no_digit():
    """Test a password with mixed case but no digit."""
    assert validate_password("Abcdefgh") is False


def test_error_non_string_input():
    """Test that non-string input raises TypeError (e.g., integer)."""
    with pytest.raises(TypeError):
        validate_password(123)  # isupper() etc. will fail on non-str


def test_error_none_input():
    """Test that None input raises TypeError."""
    with pytest.raises(TypeError):
        validate_password(None)
```
